_meta.description: Top-level index of all five Ontario Barrister Licensing Examination subjects
_meta.source: Law Society of Ontario — 2026 Barrister Licensing Examination
_meta.notes: total_exam_questions=160 reflects the actual LSO Barrister exam. Professional Responsibility is not a standalone block in the 160-question mixed exam; it appears as embedded PR-angle questions across all four substantive subjects, AND as a separate PR standalone drill mode.

subjects.notes: Covers Ontario Rules of Civil Procedure, Courts of Justice Act, Class Proceedings Act, Limitations Act 2002, Libel and Slander Act, Execution Act, Juries Act. Heavy emphasis on procedural steps, timelines, and motion practice.
primary_statutes: Rules of Civil Procedure, R.R.O. 1990, Reg. 194
Courts of Justice Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. C.43
Limitations Act, 2002, S.O. 2002, c. 24, Sched. B
Class Proceedings Act, 1992, S.O. 1992, c. 6
Juries Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. J.3
Execution Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. E.24
Libel and Slander Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. L.12

subjects.notes: Covers Criminal Code of Canada, Charter of Rights and Freedoms (criminal context), Canada Evidence Act, Youth Criminal Justice Act. Heavy emphasis on procedure, admissibility, bail, sentencing, and Charter remedies.
primary_statutes: Criminal Code, R.S.C. 1985, c. C-46
Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms, Part I of the Constitution Act, 1982
Canada Evidence Act, R.S.C. 1985, c. C-5
Youth Criminal Justice Act, S.C. 2002, c. 1
high_priority_topics: Charter rights on arrest and detention (ss. 8, 9, 10)

subjects.notes: Covers Family Law Act, Divorce Act, Children's Law Reform Act, Child Youth and Family Services Act 2017, Federal Child Support Guidelines, Family Responsibility and Support Arrears Enforcement Act, Change of Name Act, Income Tax implications. Heavy emphasis on property, support, parenting, and child protection.
primary_statutes: Family Law Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. F.3
Divorce Act, R.S.C. 1985, c. 3 (2nd Supp.)
Children's Law Reform Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. C.12
Child, Youth and Family Services Act, 2017, S.O. 2017, c. 14, Sched. 1
Federal Child Support Guidelines, SOR/97-175
Family Responsibility and Support Arrears Enforcement Act, 1996, S.O. 1996, c. 31
Change of Name Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. C.7
Family Law Rules, O. Reg. 114/99
high_priority_topics: Child support (table amount and s. 7 expenses)

subjects.notes: Covers constitutional law, administrative law, judicial review, human rights, privacy, Aboriginal law. Includes Judicial Review Procedure Act, SPPA, FIPPA, PIPEDA, Crown Liability and Proceedings Act 2019, Residential Tenancies Act. High variance in topics — prepare broad coverage.
primary_statutes: Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms
Constitution Act, 1982
Judicial Review Procedure Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. J.1
Statutory Powers Procedure Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. S.22
Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. F.31
Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act, S.C. 2000, c. 5
Crown Liability and Proceedings Act, 2019, S.O. 2019, c. 7, Sched. 17
Residential Tenancies Act, 2006, S.O. 2006, c. 17
Human Rights Code, R.S.O. 1990, c. H.19
Federal Courts Act, R.S.C. 1985, c. F-7
Access to Information Act, R.S.C. 1985, c. A-1

subjects.notes: Covers LSO Rules of Professional Conduct, Law Society Act 1998, By-Laws 7 and 9, OHSA obligations for lawyers, PIPEDA obligations for law offices. PR also appears as an overlay in all other subjects — set pr_angle.applicable = true on cross-subject questions. Do not limit PR questions to standalone Professional Responsibility drills.
primary_statutes: Law Society Act, 1998, S.O. 1998, c. 21, Sched.
Rules of Professional Conduct (LSO)
By-Law 7 (Financial Transactions and Records)
By-Law 9 (Trust Accounts and Financial Records)
Occupational Health and Safety Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. O.1
Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act, S.C. 2000, c. 5
high_priority_topics: LSO disciplinary process and appeal rights
subjects.exam_mode: PR questions are not a standalone block in the 160-question mixed Barrister exam. Use: (1) pr_standalone_drill for dedicated PR study; (2) pr_overlay_exam to surface PR angles across all subjects; (3) subject_drill for a full PR question-bank drill.

full_barrister_exam.description: 160-question mixed exam mirroring the real LSO 2026 Barrister exam format. Questions are drawn from the four substantive subject banks.
full_barrister_exam.pr_overlay_note: Professional Responsibility questions appear as PR-angle overlays embedded within the four substantive sections (e.g., a civil litigation question that also tests a duty to the court, or a family law question that tests a conflict of interest). pr_angle.applicable=true on a question flags it for inclusion in PR overlay reports. PR is NOT a separate scored section in the 160-question mixed exam.

subject_drill.description: A timed drill drawing questions from a single subject blueprint. Available for all five subjects including Professional Responsibility.

pr_standalone_drill.description: A dedicated Professional Responsibility drill drawing from data/questions/professional-responsibility/ only.
pr_standalone_drill.notes: Suitable for targeted PR study before the actual Barrister exam. Not representative of the mixed 160-question exam format.

pr_overlay_exam.description: A 160-question exam where every question with pr_angle.applicable=true is preferentially selected from all four substantive subjects. Surfaces the PR dimension of the Barrister exam without changing question text or answer keys.

weak_area_drill.description: A targeted drill populated from subtopics where the student has scored below a configured threshold (default 70%) in previous sessions.
